files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles: 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman covering various Relief Society activities across missions and stakes, and 'Guide Lessons for April' which begins the lesson content for April. The split occurs where the Guide Lessons section begins with 'LESSON I' after the references section of Notes from the Field.

files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections: Lesson I (Theology), a Work and Business section on Church Organization, Lesson III (Literature on Booth Tarkington), and Lesson IV (Social Service on childhood health problems). Each section has clear topical boundaries and different subject matter.
